creator: ports@skyforge.at
text:
Created attachment 196740
py-matrix-synapse 0.33.2 to 0.33.3 patch

The 0.33.3 release of py-matrix-synapse is mix of features and bugfixes[1], despite looking like a simple patch release. None of the feature changes are drastic though, and none break existing configurations as far as I can tell. 

As far as the port is concerned, a simple version bump seems sufficient. I've tested the proposed version for the last week and it worked fine for me. 

Cheers,
Sascha

[1] https://github.com/matrix-org/synapse/releases/tag/v0.33.3
